metadata.title: Quick Side Peek Secures a Smooth Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch a fast side peek catch two enemies off guard with sharp aim and timing. This play shows how positioning really matters in tight spots.
What’s your favorite angle to surprise foes?

Drop your best quick peek plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
